title: Date range filter missing — only season (year) filter implemented
evidence: query.go:39-40 filters by Season (int) only; MatchFilter has no date-range fields. mcp.go:166 find_matches tool exposes 'season' param but no date_start/date_end.
suggestion: Add StartDate/EndDate fields to MatchFilter and expose them as tool parameters in find_matches.

title: TestLoadAll_RealData is skipped when data/kaggle absent
evidence: data_test.go:13 t.Skip("data/kaggle not present, skipping integration test")
suggestion: Ensure data directory is present during scoring, or provide an embedded test fixture.
